CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT HELENA MAY GAGNON BY THE COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF NOV-07-2016 AT 1:30 P.M., AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MUNICIPAL TRANSIT AUTHORITY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MTA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODAS, LOAMMI SOLORZANO $1,981.24 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,981.24, AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST HELENA MAY GAGNON IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE - NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
